theme: Xử lý phàn nàn của khách

vocab.example: The customer filed a complaint about the late delivery.
vocab.example_vi: Khách hàng đã gửi lời phàn nàn về việc giao hàng trễ.

vocab.example: I want to apologize for the mistake on our side.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi muốn xin lỗi về sai sót từ phía chúng tôi.

vocab.example: We're sorry for any inconvenience this has caused you.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi xin lỗi vì sự bất tiện đã gây ra cho bạn.

vocab.example: Let me investigate the issue and update you today.
vocab.example_vi: Để tôi điều tra vấn đề này và cập nhật cho bạn hôm nay.

vocab.example: We offered compensation for the shipping delay.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi đã đề nghị bồi thường cho việc giao hàng trễ.

vocab.example: The customer asked for a full refund.
vocab.example_vi: Khách hàng yêu cầu hoàn tiền toàn bộ.

vocab.example: I reassured the client that we would fix it fast.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi đã trấn an khách hàng rằng chúng tôi sẽ khắc phục nhanh.

vocab.example: We promised to make it right for the customer.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi đã hứa sẽ khắc phục thỏa đáng cho khách hàng.

lines.speaker: Hoa (khách hàng)
lines.text: Hi Nam, I need to file a complaint about the delay in our software delivery.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: I'm really sorry to hear that, Hoa. Let me apologize for the inconvenience this has caused.

lines.speaker: Hoa (khách hàng)
lines.text: It's been almost two weeks past the deadline, and it's affecting our own clients.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: I understand. Let me investigate what happened on our end right away.

lines.speaker: Hoa (khách hàng)
lines.text: I'd also like to know if there will be any compensation for the delay.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Of course, we can offer a partial refund or extend your support package for free.

lines.speaker: Hoa (khách hàng)
lines.text: That would help, but I want to make sure this doesn't happen again.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: I want to reassure you that we're fixing our internal process.

lines.speaker: Hoa (khách hàng)
lines.text: Thank you, I appreciate you taking this seriously.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: We'll make it right, Hoa. I'll send you an update by tomorrow.

options: To complain about a delayed delivery
To ask for a product demo

questions.q: What does Nam offer to make up for the delay?
options: A partial refund or free extended support

questions.q: What does Nam promise to do next?

shadowing: I need to file a complaint about the delay in delivery.
Let me apologize for the inconvenience this has caused you.
I'll investigate what happened and get back to you soon.
We can offer a partial refund or extended support for free.
I want to reassure you that we're fixing this process.
